metadata.title: Notable / major earthquakes affecting Nepal (1934-2025)
metadata.description: Curated list of historically significant earthquakes in and around Nepal, with human impact. Magnitudes and casualty figures are widely reported estimates; sources vary.
metadata.coordinate_source: Epicentres from USGS ComCat (exact event coordinates); casualty figures are widely reported estimates.

properties.summary_en: One of the deadliest quakes in South Asian history; devastated eastern Nepal and Bihar, with severe damage in Kathmandu.
properties.summary_ne: दक्षिण एसियाको इतिहासकै सबैभन्दा घातक भूकम्पमध्ये एक; पूर्वी नेपाल र बिहारमा भीषण क्षति, काठमाडौंमा ठूलो विनाश।

properties.summary_en: Struck far-western Nepal, killing around 125 people and damaging thousands of homes in remote hill districts.
properties.summary_ne: सुदूरपश्चिम नेपालमा गई करिब १२५ जनाको ज्यान लियो र दुर्गम पहाडी जिल्लाका हजारौं घरमा क्षति पुर्‍यायो।

properties.summary_en: An eastern-Nepal quake that killed over 700 people and damaged tens of thousands of buildings across the region.
properties.summary_ne: पूर्वी नेपालको भूकम्प जसले ७०० भन्दा बढीको ज्यान लियो र क्षेत्रभरि हजारौं संरचनामा क्षति पुर्‍यायो।

properties.summary_en: Centered near the Nepal–India (Sikkim) border; felt strongly across eastern Nepal, causing deaths and damage.
properties.summary_ne: नेपाल–भारत (सिक्किम) सीमा नजिक केन्द्रित; पूर्वी नेपालभरि प्रबल रूपमा महसुस, ज्यान र क्षति।

properties.summary_en: Nepal's worst disaster in over 80 years: nearly 9,000 killed, ~22,000 injured and over half a million homes destroyed.
properties.summary_ne: ८० वर्षयताको नेपालको सबैभन्दा ठूलो विपद्: करिब ९,००० मृत्यु, ~२२,००० घाइते र पाँच लाखभन्दा बढी घर ध्वस्त।

properties.summary_en: A major aftershock 17 days after the Gorkha quake, killing over 200 more and toppling already-weakened buildings.
properties.summary_ne: गोरखा भूकम्पको १७ दिनपछिको ठूलो पराकम्प, २०० भन्दा बढीको थप ज्यान लियो र कमजोर भइसकेका भवन ढाल्यो।

properties.summary_en: A shallow night-time quake in Karnali (M6.4 per Nepal NSC; M5.7 USGS) that killed about 154 people in western Nepal.
properties.summary_ne: कर्णालीमा रातको उथ्लो भूकम्प (नेपाल NSC अनुसार M६.४; USGS M५.७) जसले पश्चिम नेपालमा करिब १५४ जनाको ज्यान लियो।

properties.summary_en: A powerful quake just north of the Nepal border in Tibet; felt strongly across northern and eastern Nepal.
properties.summary_ne: नेपाल सीमाको ठीक उत्तर तिब्बतमा शक्तिशाली भूकम्प; उत्तरी र पूर्वी नेपालभरि प्रबल रूपमा महसुस।
